posts.text: Love taps resume: explosions heard in Iran's Sirik City, near the Strait of Hormuz.
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: “When the order itself begins to crumble, the benefits of Putinist revisionism quickly disappear,” argues a former senior official in the Russian government in a guest essay https://www.economist.com/by-invitation/2026/05/06/vladimir-putin-is-losing-his-grip-on-russia?taid=69fdde614b0f79000163a848&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: The US economy adds 115,000 jobs in April, crushing expectations of 65,000.

The unemployment rate was 4.3%, in-line with expectations of 4.3%.

The US economy has now added +300,000 jobs in 2 months.

Another stronger than expected jobs report despite the Iran War.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: We already blockaded their blockade… but what if we also threaten to mine Hormuz …??
posts.author: hkuppy
